name: Fat Free Fudge - Good
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, cocoa, and milk in a large pot.
2. Bring mixture to a full boil, stirring constantly.
3. Once boiling, use a candy thermometer to check the temperature reaches 234°F (soft ball stage).
4. Remove from heat and sprinkle butter buds and extracts over the top.
5. Allow mixture to cool until it reaches 110°F.
6. Beat thoroughly to break up any lumps and return glossiness.
7. Quickly spread into an 8 or 9-inch pan.
8. Allow to cool completely before cutting.
NOTES: Per Serving Calories - 45 Total Fat - .1g (2% of daily value)
